Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

Al Jawla covers the latest news and stories from sporting events across the planet. Including latest results and latest scores from the most recent games taking place. This daily look at the latest stories provides a fast paced update to sporting events.

In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
A  daily Special Interview related to an important issue of the day. The interview offers the background and insight into the issue chosen from the world of sport.
"Special Report" is a single long feature from one of beIN SPORTS News reporters that takes an alternative look at a subject from the world of sport.
A special News Bulletin from the beIN SPORTS News Room with the addition of sign language for the hard of hearing.
"Al Hassila" provides a concise recap of the latest sports matches, highlighting key goals and noteworthy moments from around the world of sports.

This week SoAnne is in Nantes. The football challenge will see 6 children compete on a life-size tic-tac-toe board, coached by Johann Lepenant. Pablo Pagis will answer questions from Maeli and Alana for the locker room interview at FC Lorient, and Sidiki has a wonderful surprise in store for his number one fan.
The Issue Of The Day, from the beIn Sports News Team, takes an in depth look at the the main story form the world of sport from the last 24 hours.
Al Hassad is a nighltly studio from beIN Sports News that looks at the stories that have made the headlines in the world of sport and those stories that will be making the headlines tomorrow morning.
